overview: Wraith is a SubBoss-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Inferno, Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 600 HP, 20 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 10 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 200% ratio (400 base damage). Elite gains 3 exclusive abilityies: Attack1 Elite, Attack2 Elite, Attack3 Elite. Nightmare gains 4 exclusive abilityies: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack1 Combo.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 10 melee attacks. Attack1 (200%), Attack2 (100%), Attack3 (130%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Wraith Slow
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Wraith Slow icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-3000), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Dark, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Dark (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack1 (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack1 deals 400 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Elite Gains: Attack1 Elite, Attack2 Elite, Attack3 Elite
strategies.description: Elite grade has 3 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack1 Elite, Attack2 Elite, Attack3 Elite. These change the fight dynamics in Elite.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack1 Combo
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 4 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack1 Combo. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
Elite gains 3 exclusive abilities: Attack1 Elite, Attack2 Elite, Attack3 Elite
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 4 exclusive abilities: Attack1 Nightmare, Attack2 Nightmare, Attack3 Nightmare, Attack1 Combo

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
